languages.text: {n}Полковник окидывает вас яростным взглядом, но все же отцепляет от ремня пару ручных огнеметов.{/n} "Вот, оружие Первого Призыва. Редкое и ценное. Будете погибать, взорвите перед смертью".
languages.translation_comment: Выдать РТ пару ручных огнеметов каких-то самых плохих.

languages.text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."
languages.original_text: {n}Полковник окидывает вас яростным взглядом, но все же отцепляет от ремня пару ручных огнеметов.{/n} "Вот, оружие Первого Призыва. Редкое и ценное. Будете погибать, взорвите перед смертью".

traits.locale_text: {n}The Colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

{n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."
"Here, take two flamers. Weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and valuable... but perhaps they will buy us some time."

{n}The Colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

{n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

{n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

languages.text: 「こちら、火炎放射器を二丁お持ちください。第一コールアップの武器です。希少で貴重ですが……それで少しは時間を稼げるかもしれません」
languages.original_text: "Here, take two flamers. Weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and valuable... but perhaps they will buy us some time."

traits.locale_text: こちら、火炎放射器を二丁お持ちください。第一コールアップの武器です。希少で貴重ですが……それで少しは時間を稼げるかもしれません。

languages.text: {n}Le colonel vous fixe d'un regard féroce, ce qui ne l'empêche pas de détacher de sa ceinture une paire de lance-flammes légers.{/n} « Tenez, ces armes remontent à la Première Mobilisation. Elles sont rares et précieuses. Quand votre heure viendra, activez-les avant de mourir. »
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le colonel vous fixe d'un regard féroce, ce qui ne l'empêche pas de détacher de sa ceinture une paire de lance-flammes légers.{/n} « Tenez, ces armes remontent à la Première Mobilisation. Elles sont rares et précieuses. Quand votre heure viendra, activez-les avant de mourir. »

languages.text: {n}Albay sana sert bir bakış atsa da kemerindeki el alevsaçanlarını çıkarıyor.{/n} "Bunlar, İlk Sevk Grubu'nun silahları. Nadir ve değerlidirler. Zamanı geldiğinde can vermeden önce bunları patlatmak gerek."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

traits.locale_text: {n}Albay sana sert bir bakış atsa da kemerindeki el alevsaçanlarını çıkarıyor.{/n} "Bunlar, İlk Sevk Grubu'nun silahları. Nadir ve değerlidirler. Zamanı geldiğinde can vermeden önce bunları patlatmak gerek."

languages.text: {n}El coronel te fulmina con la mirada, pero desengancha un par de pistolas lanzallamas que lleva colgadas del cinto.{/n} «Tenga, armas de los primeros llamados. Escasas y valiosas. Cuando le llegue la hora, detónelas antes de morir».
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

traits.locale_text: {n}El coronel te fulmina con la mirada, pero desengancha un par de pistolas lanzallamas que lleva colgadas del cinto.{/n} «Tenga, armas de los primeros llamados. Escasas y valiosas. Cuando le llegue la hora, detónelas antes de morir».

languages.text: {n}上校狠狠地瞪了你一眼，但还是从腰间解下两把火焰喷射器。{/n}“拿着，初代征召者留下的武器，稀世珍品。等您真走到绝路了，记得在死前把它引爆。”
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

traits.locale_text: {n}上校狠狠地瞪了你一眼，但还是从腰间解下两把火焰喷射器。{/n}“拿着，初代征召者留下的武器，稀世珍品。等您真走到绝路了，记得在死前把它引爆。”

languages.text: {n}Der Colonel fixiert dich mit grimmiger Miene, löst aber trotzdem zwei Flammenpistolen von seinem Gürtel.{/n} "Hier, Waffen der Ersten Einberufung. Selten und kostbar. Wenn Eure Zeit gekommen ist, zündet sie, ehe Ihr sterbt."
languages.original_text: {n}The colonel fixes you with a fierce glare, but nonetheless unclips a pair of hand flamers from his belt.{/n} "Here, weapons of the First Call-Up. Rare and precious. When your time comes, detonate them before you die."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Colonel fixiert dich mit grimmiger Miene, löst aber trotzdem zwei Flammenpistolen von seinem Gürtel.{/n} "Hier, Waffen der Ersten Einberufung. Selten und kostbar. Wenn Eure Zeit gekommen ist, zündet sie, ehe Ihr sterbt."
